name: Portfolio Showcase
description: Project grid and detail views for portfolio work. Grid-first showcase routes with strong atmosphere, generous whitespace, and large imagery that lets the work shine without redundant hero containers.

page_briefs.projects: Grid-first project showcase route. A brief editorial lead-in may appear above the grid, but the project cards are the primary visual proof and should arrive quickly. Avoid stacking a second oversized hero or empty proof panel above the cards. Each card shows a project thumbnail, title, and brief description, with generous gaps and responsive columns that adapt from 1 to 3 columns.
page_briefs.project-detail: Full-bleed hero image with overlaid project title and metadata. Below, a detail header with project description, tech stack pills, timeline, and links. Content flows with full-bleed images interspersed with concise text blocks for case-study storytelling.

shells.full-bleed: Edge-to-edge layout with minimal chrome to maximize visual impact of project imagery
